scripts.build:dist:
rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html app.js api.js db.js local-ai.js styles.css manifest.webmanifest service-worker.js dist/ && printf '/api/sentence /.netlify/functions/sentence 200
/api/reading /.netlify/functions/reading 200
/api/tts /.netlify/functions/tts 200
/api/audio /.netlify/functions/audio 200
' > dist/_redirects
scripts.deploy:anon: npm run build:dist && npx netlify-cli deploy --prod --dir dist --functions netlify/functions --allow-anonymous
